'''Delaluna''' was the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Junction V]].

==History==
Before the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]], the natives of Delaluna were accused of developing a [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]] known as the [[Annihilator (superweapon)|Annihilator]]. Although its existence was denied, the people of Junction V lived in fear. The rumor was Started by [[Lorian Nod|One of Count Dooku's old friends]] who was once a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]]. He then created a fear free planet only in fear of his power until [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] proved it as falsified information.

The people of Junction V and Delaluna made peace after a war shortly before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] and joined with the people of [[Vicondor/Legends|Vicondor]] and [[Bezim]] to build the [[Station 88 Spaceport]]. This coalition of [[Planet/Legends|planets]] chose to remain loyal to the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

{{Moon-stub}}
